summary: Classified #68423 as the live canonical issue and #68462 as the useful open implementation candidate, but no close, merge, or fix action is planned because this is a dedupe-only job and #68462 still has unresolved review-bot findings. Hydrated linked issue #64046 is scoped out to security routing because it is a broad sensitive-data persistence/exposure umbrella and should not control the narrow backup-pollution cluster.

actions.reason: Quarantine the broad sensitive-data persistence/exposure umbrella to central OpenClaw security handling without blocking classification of the unrelated narrow backup-pollution items.
#68423 remains the best canonical issue for the narrow backup-pollution root cause.
#68462 is the best open implementation candidate for #68423, but it is not merge-ready and this job disallows merge/fix work.
